      sorry
    rw [h_exp_zero]
    simp
  obtain ⟨C, hC⟩ := h_bounded
  have h_tendsto : Tendsto (fun m ↦ C / (m : ℝ) ^ (1 / 2)) atTop (𝓝 0) := by
    apply tendsto_const_div_atTop
    exact pow_pos (Nat.cast_pos.mpr (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero fun h => by simp_all)) (1 / 2)
